---
title: "Hackathons"
title-block-style: none
subtitle: "Intensive collaborative events to solve real-world challenges"
description: "Participate in hackathons on cybersecurity, AI ethics, and space technology. 48-hour challenges with real teams and real problems."
page-layout: custom
toc: false
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
from: markdown+raw_html
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="ev-hero" style="min-height:60vh;">
  <div class="ev-hero-bg" style="background-image:url('/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp');"></div>
  <div class="ev-hero-content">
    <div class="ev-hero-tag" style="background:#F5A623;">Academy Programs</div>
    <h1>Hackathons</h1>
    <p>48-hour challenges where innovation meets collaboration. Real problems, real teams, real deadlines.</p>
    <a href="#hackathons" class="ev-btn" style="background:#F5A623;">See hackathons</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:4rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-n">
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">9</div><div class="m-nl">Editions</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">48h</div><div class="m-nl">Per event</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">100+</div><div class="m-nl">Participants</div></div>
      <div><div class="m-nn" style="color:#F5A623;">3</div><div class="m-nl">Tracks</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" id="hackathons" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Our hackathons</h2>
    <p class="sub">Three tracks, one mission: build something that matters.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/programs/hackathons/spaceapps/" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="SpaceApps"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Oct 2026 &middot; Craiova</div><h3>SpaceApps Challenge</h3><p>NASA's global 48-hour hackathon. Space exploration, satellite tech, and Earth observation.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/ai-ethics-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hacker-screens.webp" alt="AI Ethics"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">March 2026 &middot; Bucharest</div><h3>AI Ethics Hackathon</h3><p>Ethical AI, bias detection, responsible design, and AI that puts people first.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
      <div class="col-md-4">
        <a href="/academy/events/pages/cybersecurity-hackathon.html" style="text-decoration:none;">
          <div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/cybersecurity-monitor.webp" alt="Cybersecurity"><div class="pg-card-body"><div style="font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:700;color:#F5A623;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:0.3rem;">Nov 2026 &middot; Craiova</div><h3>Cybersecurity Hackathon</h3><p>CTF, incident response, defense strategies, and security tool development.</p></div></div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-bg" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-r">
      <div class="m-ri"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/hackathon-team.webp" alt="Hackathon teams"></div>
      <div class="m-rt">
        <h2>Build under pressure.<br>Learn faster.</h2>
        <p>Our hackathons bring together developers, designers, scientists, and domain experts. Over 48 hours, teams ideate, design, and prototype solutions guided by industry mentors. The best ideas get funding and follow-on support.</p>
        <div class="lk"><a href="/booking/" class="m-lk">Discuss sponsorship</a></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s" style="padding:7rem 0;">
  <div class="container">
    <h2>Get involved</h2>
    <p class="sub">Three ways to be part of our hackathons.</p>
    <div class="row g-4">
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/code-screen.webp" alt="Participate"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Participate</h3><p>Join a team, build a prototype, and compete for prizes and recognition.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/team-macbooks.webp" alt="Mentor"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Mentor</h3><p>Share your expertise and guide teams through technical challenges.</p></div></div></div>
      <div class="col-md-4"><div class="pg-card"><img loading="lazy" src="/assets/images/stock/network-closeup.webp" alt="Sponsor"><div class="pg-card-body"><h3>Sponsor</h3><p>Support innovation by sponsoring events, challenges, or prizes.</p></div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-cta">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="m-d"></div>
    <h2>Ready to hack?</h2>
    <p>Register for the next hackathon or discuss hosting one for your organization.</p>
    <div style="display:flex; gap:0.75rem; justify-content:center; flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <a href="/academy/events.html" class="m-b" style="background:#F5A623; color:#fff !important;">See all events</a>
      <a href="/booking/" class="m-bo" style="border-color:#F5A623; color:#F5A623;">Book a call</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
